flashcards.back: Figuring out how and why things work in nature. Observing, understanding, predicting.

flashcards.front: What's the basic cycle of physics?
flashcards.back: Observe → Understand → Predict → Build. See what happens, figure out why, know what comes next, make cool stuff.
No! Physics is everywhere. Your phone, food, body, everything. You use it every day.
Math lets you be exact about predictions. Words are vague. Numbers are precise. Physics needs precision.
Ball falling down = gravity. Light bouncing = reflection. Phone charging = electricity. Sky being blue = light scattering.

flashcards.front: What can you do if you understand physics?
flashcards.back: Predict what will happen. Design better products. Explain why things work. Solve problems.
